description: 示例功能 - 添加任务标签系统 (演示 Ralph 工作流)

constitution: Spec-Driven Development: 规范先于代码
Small Iterations: 每个任务可在一轮迭代内完成
Verified: 每个验收标准必须可自动化验证

userStories.title: 添加标签数据模型
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Tag data model so that tasks can be categorized.

spec.research: 检查现有数据模型结构
spec.plan: 创建 Tag 类和 tags.json 存储

acceptanceCriteria: Create Tag class with: id, name, color, createdAt
Create tags.json storage file with sample tags
Implement createTag(), getTag(), listTags(), deleteTag() functions
Add unit tests for all CRUD operations

userStories.title: 添加标签管理 CLI 命令
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage tags via CLI commands.

spec.research: 检查现有 CLI 命令结构
spec.plan: 添加 tag add/list/remove 命令

acceptanceCriteria: Add 'tag list' command with colored output

userStories.title: 任务标签关联功能
userStories.description: As a user, I want to assign tags to tasks.

spec.research: 检查现有任务数据结构
spec.plan: 添加 tags 字段到任务，实现关联逻辑

acceptanceCriteria: Add tags array field to task schema
Display tags on task list with colored badges

userStories.title: 文档和示例
userStories.description: As a new user, I want documentation and examples for using the tag system.

spec.plan: 添加标签系统使用指南

acceptanceCriteria: Add TAGS.md user guide in docs/
Update README.md with tags feature mention
